text: I woke up at 5:30, hated it, but went to the gym anyway. It's a reminder that every rep is a step closer to my dreams, even when it feels like a sacrifice. 2 months off and I'm back to square one.
decision_reason: Shares a personal struggle and connects it to the audience's desire for progress

text: It's tough to see others pushing through struggles when you're not. I'm still trying to fix my sleep schedule and get back to the gym, but knowing others are in the same boat helps. Even successful people have off days, not just highlight reels.

audience_fit.desire: belonging to a group that gets it

decision_reason: Validates the audience's emotions and offers a sense of community
